<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Absolut Zero — Autonomous Thermal Intelligence</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg: #04091a;
  --cyan: #00e5ff;
  --blue: #1a4fd4;
  --dblue: #0d2670;
  --white: #f0f8ff;
  --grey: #7a8fa8;
  --dim: #c0d4e4;
  --card-bg: rgba(26,79,212,0.08);
  --card-border: rgba(0,229,255,0.18);
  --neon: 0 0 8px #00e5ff, 0 0 20px rgba(0,229,255,0.4);
}
* { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
html, body { width:100vw; height:100vh; overflow:hidden; background:var(--bg); color:var(--white); font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif; }

body::before {
  content:''; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(0,229,255,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,229,255,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size:60px 60px; pointer-events:none;
}
body::after {
  content:''; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:999; pointer-events:none;
  background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 3px,rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 3px,rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 4px);
}

/* ── SLIDES ── */
#deck { position:relative; width:100vw; height:100vh; }
.slide {
  position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column;
  justify-content:center; align-items:center;
  padding:68px 90px 58px;
  opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px) scale(0.97);
  transition:opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
  pointer-events:none; z-index:1;
}
.slide.active { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) scale(1); pointer-events:all; }

/* ── TOP BAR ── */
#topbar {
  position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:52px; z-index:200;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
  padding:0 24px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(4,9,26,0.95) 0%, transparent 100%);
  backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
}
#corner-logo { height:36px; display:none; }
#corner-logo img { height:100%; }

#slide-counter { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:3px; color:rgba(0,229,255,0.6); }

/* ── PROGRESS ── */
#progress-bar { position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; z-index:200; height:2px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1a4fd4,#00e5ff); box-shadow:var(--neon); transition:width 0.4s ease; }
#dot-nav {
  position:fixed; bottom:14px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%);
  z-index:200; display:flex; gap:7px;
}
.dot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:rgba(0,229,255,0.25); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.4); cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.3s; }
.dot.active { background:var(--cyan); box-shadow:var(--neon); width:18px; border-radius:3px; }

/* ── NAV BUTTONS ── */
.nav-btn {
  position:fixed; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%);
  z-index:200; width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.2);
  color:#00e5ff; font-size:16px; cursor:pointer;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  transition:all 0.25s; backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
}
.nav-btn:hover { background:rgba(0,229,255,0.16); box-shadow:var(--neon); }
#btn-prev { left:14px; }
#btn-next { right:14px; }

/* ── HINT ── */
#hint { position:fixed; bottom:38px; right:24px; z-index:200; font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:9px; letter-spacing:2px; color:rgba(0,229,255,0.3); }

/* ── TYPOGRAPHY ── */
.tag { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:4px; color:var(--cyan); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:10px; opacity:0.8; }
.slide-title { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:clamp(1.4rem,2.4vw,2.2rem); font-weight:700; text-align:center; margin-bottom:14px; line-height:1.2; }
.slide-title em { color:var(--cyan); font-style:normal; }
.neon-bar { width:52px; height:2px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1a4fd4,#00e5ff); margin:0 auto 20px; box-shadow:var(--neon); }

/* ── QUOTE ── */
.quote {
  border-left:2px solid var(--cyan); padding:10px 18px;
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.04); border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;
  max-width:820px; margin-bottom:18px; cursor:pointer;
  transition:all 0.3s;
}
.quote:hover { background:rgba(0,229,255,0.08); border-left-color:#fff; }
.quote p { font-size:0.95rem; font-style:italic; color:#9ecce0; line-height:1.5; }
.quote cite { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:rgba(0,229,255,0.5); display:block; margin-top:5px; }

/* ── BULLET POINTS (REVEAL ON CLICK) ── */
.pts { list-style:none; width:100%; max-width:860px; }
.pts li {
  display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:14px;
  padding:10px 0; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.07);
  font-size:clamp(0.88rem,1.35vw,1.08rem); color:var(--dim); line-height:1.45;
  opacity:0; transform:translateX(-16px);
  transition:opacity 0.4s ease, transform 0.4s ease;
}
.pts li.revealed { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
.pts li::before { content:'▸'; color:var(--cyan); font-size:0.75rem; flex-shrink:0; }
.pts li strong { color:#fff; font-weight:600; }
.pts li .hi { color:var(--cyan); font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.83em; font-weight:700; }

/* Immediate (non-step) bullet reveal for some slides */
.pts.instant li { opacity:1; transform:none; transition:none; }

/* ── STAT CARDS ── */
.stat-row { display:flex; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; margin:14px 0; width:100%; max-width:900px; }
.scard {
  flex:1; min-width:150px; max-width:210px;
  background:var(--card-bg); border:1px solid var(--card-border);
  border-radius:10px; padding:18px 12px; text-align:center;
  transition:all 0.3s; cursor:default;
}
.scard:hover { border-color:var(--cyan); box-shadow:0 0 22px rgba(0,229,255,0.2); transform:translateY(-4px); }
.scard .num { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:clamp(1.3rem,2vw,1.9rem); font-weight:700; color:var(--cyan); display:block; margin-bottom:5px; }
.scard .lbl { font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--grey); line-height:1.3; }

/* ── FLOW ── */
.flow { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; margin:14px 0; }
.chip {
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.28);
  border-radius:6px; padding:8px 20px; font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;
  font-size:0.76rem; color:var(--cyan); white-space:nowrap;
  cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.25s;
}
.chip:hover, .chip.active { background:rgba(0,229,255,0.2); box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(0,229,255,0.3); border-color:var(--cyan); color:#fff; }
.arr { color:rgba(0,229,255,0.35); font-size:1.2rem; }

/* ── TABLE ── */
.ctable { width:100%; max-width:900px; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:0.86rem; }
.ctable th { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:2px; color:var(--cyan); padding:9px 12px; text-align:left; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.3); }
.ctable td { padding:9px 12px; color:var(--dim); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); transition:background 0.2s; }
.ctable tr:hover td { background:rgba(0,229,255,0.04); }
.ctable tr.us td { color:var(--cyan); font-weight:600; background:rgba(0,229,255,0.05); }
.ctable td.x { color:#ff6b6b; }
.ctable td.check { color:#4ade80; }

/* ── TWO COL ── */
.two-col { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:28px; width:100%; max-width:960px; }
.col-box { background:var(--card-bg); border:1px solid var(--card-border); border-radius:10px; padding:20px 18px; transition:all 0.3s; }
.col-box:hover { border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.4); }
.col-box h3 { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.76rem; color:var(--cyan); letter-spacing:2px; margin-bottom:12px; }

/* ── TIMELINE ── */
.timeline { display:flex; gap:8px; width:100%; max-width:1000px; overflow-x:auto; }
.phase {
  flex:1; min-width:120px; background:var(--card-bg); border:1px solid var(--card-border);
  border-radius:8px; padding:14px 10px; text-align:center; cursor:pointer;
  transition:all 0.3s; position:relative;
}
.phase:hover, .phase.selected { border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.6); background:rgba(0,229,255,0.08); transform:translateY(-3px); }
.phase .ph-n { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.6rem; color:rgba(0,229,255,0.6); display:block; margin-bottom:4px; }
.phase .ph-t { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#fff; display:block; margin-bottom:4px; }
.phase .ph-s { font-size:0.68rem; color:var(--grey); }
#phase-detail { min-height:50px; background:rgba(0,229,255,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.2); border-radius:8px; padding:14px 18px; width:100%; max-width:1000px; margin-top:10px; font-size:0.9rem; color:var(--dim); transition:all 0.3s; text-align:center; display:none; }

/* ── PILLARS ── */
.pillars { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; width:100%; max-width:780px; }
.pillar { background:var(--card-bg); border:1px solid var(--card-border); border-radius:10px; padding:16px 14px; transition:all 0.3s; cursor:default; }
.pillar:hover { border-color:var(--cyan); box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(0,229,255,0.12); transform:translateY(-2px); }
.pillar .pnum { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:1.3rem; font-weight:900; color:rgba(0,229,255,0.2); display:block; margin-bottom:3px; }
.pillar .ptitle { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.74rem; color:var(--cyan); display:block; margin-bottom:5px; }
.pillar .pdesc { font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--dim); line-height:1.4; }

/* ── CITIES ── */
.cities { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr); gap:10px; width:100%; max-width:1000px; }
.city { background:var(--card-bg); border:1px solid var(--card-border); border-radius:8px; padding:12px 8px; text-align:center; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.3s; }
.city:hover { border-color:var(--cyan); transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(0,229,255,0.1); }
.city .cy-yr { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.6rem; color:rgba(0,229,255,0.6); display:block; margin-bottom:3px; }
.city .cy-nm { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.8rem; color:#fff; font-weight:700; display:block; margin-bottom:3px; }
.city .cy-mw { font-size:0.73rem; color:var(--cyan); display:block; margin-bottom:2px; }
.city .cy-note { font-size:0.65rem; color:var(--grey); }

/* ── PUE CALCULATOR (Slide 8) ── */
#pue-calc { background:rgba(0,229,255,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.2); border-radius:12px; padding:20px 28px; width:100%; max-width:700px; margin-top:14px; }
#pue-calc h3 { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:var(--cyan); letter-spacing:2px; margin-bottom:14px; text-align:center; }
.calc-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px; margin-bottom:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.calc-row label { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:var(--grey); width:160px; flex-shrink:0; }
#mw-slider { flex:1; min-width:120px; accent-color:var(--cyan); }
.calc-val { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:1rem; color:var(--cyan); min-width:80px; }
.calc-result { display:flex; gap:14px; margin-top:14px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; }
.calc-box { background:rgba(26,79,212,0.15); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.25); border-radius:8px; padding:12px 18px; text-align:center; flex:1; min-width:130px; }
.calc-box .r-val { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:1.2rem; color:var(--cyan); display:block; }
.calc-box .r-lbl { font-size:0.72rem; color:var(--grey); }

/* ── BRAND CARDS ── */
.brand-row { display:flex; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; width:100%; max-width:900px; }
.brand-card { background:var(--card-bg); border:1px solid var(--card-border); border-radius:10px; padding:18px 20px; flex:1; min-width:155px; max-width:200px; text-align:center; cursor:default; transition:all 0.3s; }
.brand-card:hover { border-color:var(--cyan); box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(0,229,255,0.15); transform:translateY(-3px); }
.brand-card .bc-icon { font-size:1.7rem; margin-bottom:7px; display:block; }
.brand-card .bc-title { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:var(--cyan); display:block; margin-bottom:5px; }
.brand-card .bc-desc { font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--dim); line-height:1.4; }

/* ── SLIDE 1 ── */
#s1 { background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 40%, rgba(13,38,112,0.8) 0%, #04091a 65%); }
.s1-logo-wrap { margin-bottom:28px; }
.s1-logo-wrap img { width:380px; max-width:62vw; filter:drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(0,229,255,0.5)); }
.s1-tagline { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:clamp(0.7rem,1.2vw,1rem); letter-spacing:4px; color:rgba(0,229,255,0.7); text-align:center; margin-bottom:32px; text-transform:uppercase; }
.s1-team { display:flex; gap:40px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.s1-name { text-align:center; }
.s1-name span { display:block; font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:#fff; margin-bottom:2px; }
.s1-name small { font-size:0.7rem; color:var(--grey); }
.s1-sub { font-size:0.75rem; color:rgba(0,229,255,0.4); letter-spacing:2px; font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; margin-top:10px; text-align:center; }

/* ── CLOSE ── */
#s14 { background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(13,38,112,0.7) 0%, #04091a 60%); }
.close-quote { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:clamp(0.9rem,1.6vw,1.4rem); font-weight:700; color:#fff; text-align:center; max-width:800px; line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:22px; }
.close-quote em { color:var(--cyan); font-style:normal; }
.pilot-box { background:var(--card-bg); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.3); border-radius:12px; padding:22px 32px; text-align:center; max-width:620px; }
.pilot-box h3 { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--cyan); letter-spacing:3px; margin-bottom:12px; }
.pilot-box p { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--dim); line-height:1.6; }

/* ── BIG STAT ── */
.big-stat { font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:clamp(3rem,7vw,5rem); font-weight:900; color:var(--cyan); line-height:1; text-shadow:var(--neon); text-align:center; margin:6px 0; }
.big-sub { font-size:0.88rem; color:var(--grey); text-align:center; margin-bottom:18px; }

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
@keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
.anim { opacity:0; }
.slide.active .anim { animation:fadeUp 0.5s ease forwards; }
.slide.active .anim:nth-child(1) { animation-delay:0.05s; }
.slide.active .anim:nth-child(2) { animation-delay:0.15s; }
.slide.active .anim:nth-child(3) { animation-delay:0.25s; }
.slide.active .anim:nth-child(4) { animation-delay:0.35s; }
.slide.active .anim:nth-child(5) { animation-delay:0.45s; }
.slide.active .anim:nth-child(6) { animation-delay:0.55s; }
.slide.active .anim:nth-child(7) { animation-delay:0.65s; }

@keyframes logoPulse { 0%,100% { filter:drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(0,229,255,0.4)); } 50% { filter:drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(0,229,255,0.8)); } }
.s1-logo-wrap img { animation:logoPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; }

@keyframes counterUp { from { opacity:0; transform:scale(0.7); } to { opacity:1; transform:scale(1); } }

/* Click-to-advance indicator */
.click-hint { position:absolute; bottom:50px; right:50px; font-family:'Orbitron',monospace; font-size:9px; color:rgba(0,229,255,0.4); letter-spacing:2px; animation:blink 1.5s ease infinite; }
@keyframes blink { 0%,100% { opacity:0.3; } 50% { opacity:1; } }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- TOP BAR -->
<div id="topbar">
  <div id="corner-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Absolut Zero"></div>
  <div id="slide-counter">01 / 14</div>
</div>

<div id="progress-bar" style="width:7.14%"></div>
<div id="dot-nav"></div>
<div id="hint">SPACE / → TO ADVANCE</div>

<button class="nav-btn" id="btn-prev">&#8592;</button>
<button class="nav-btn" id="btn-next">&#8594;</button>

<!-- ═══════════════════════ DECK ═══════════════════════ -->
<div id="deck">

<!-- ─── SLIDE 1 · TITLE ─── -->
<div class="slide active" id="s1" data-n="1" data-steps="0">
  <div class="s1-logo-wrap anim">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Absolut Zero">
  </div>
  <p class="s1-tagline anim">Autonomous Thermal Intelligence for Bengaluru's Data Centres</p>
  <div class="s1-team anim">
    <div class="s1-name"><span>Rahul Pai</span><small>2420454</small></div>
    <div class="s1-name"><span>Shanmugaa Rajan</span><small>2420460</small></div>
    <div class="s1-name"><span>Shri Gowri D</span><small>2420461</small></div>
  </div>
  <p class="s1-sub anim">BBA204-4 &nbsp;·&nbsp; CIA 3 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Christ (Deemed-To-Be) University &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2026</p>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 2 · PROBLEM ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s2" data-n="2" data-steps="5">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:900px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Problem Statement</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">Bengaluru's Servers Are <em>Overheating.</em><br>So Are Their Bills.</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="quote anim" title="Click me!">
      <p>"Every server has its limit. So does your electricity bill."</p>
      <cite>— The Problem No One's Solving</cite>
    </div>
    <ul class="pts anim">
      <li>Cooling = <strong class="hi">35–45%</strong> of total data centre energy in India — single largest cost driver</li>
      <li>Bengaluru average PUE: <strong class="hi">1.5–1.6</strong> vs. global hyperscaler benchmark of <strong class="hi">1.1–1.2</strong></li>
      <li>A 1 MW facility burns <strong class="hi">₹2.4 crore/year</strong> on cooling alone at BESCOM HT-2 rates</li>
      <li>AI GPU racks hit <strong class="hi">40–100 kW</strong> per rack — CRAC systems weren't built for this</li>
      <li>Current systems: <strong>static, reactive, climate-blind</strong> — they respond after damage is already done</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 3 · MARKET ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s3" data-n="3" data-steps="3">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:920px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Market Opportunity</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">The City That Never Sleeps.<br>And <em>Neither Do Its Servers.</em></h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="stat-row anim">
      <div class="scard"><span class="num" data-target="205">0</span><span class="lbl">MW installed capacity (2024)</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num" data-target="414">0</span><span class="lbl">MW projected by 2030</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">₹10 Cr</span><span class="lbl">Capital subsidy cap, Karnataka DC Policy</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">100%</span><span class="lbl">Electricity duty exemption, 5 years</span></div>
    </div>
    <ul class="pts anim">
      <li><strong>Target:</strong> Tier II/III colocation DCs, <strong class="hi">50–500 racks</strong> — too big to ignore waste, too small to build own AI</li>
      <li>DPDPA 2023 mandates local data storage — <strong>forcing more DCs to be built</strong> in Bengaluru</li>
      <li>Karnataka DC Policy 2022–27: green tech operators get <strong>7% capex subsidy + green power rebate</strong></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 4 · SOLUTION ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s4" data-n="4" data-steps="4">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:900px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Our Solution</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">Meet <em>Absolut Zero.</em><br>Your Cooling Bill's Worst Nightmare.</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="quote anim">
      <p>"I'll be back." — Your cooling bill won't be.</p>
      <cite>— T-800, Terminator (1984) · adapted</cite>
    </div>
    <p class="anim" style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--grey);margin-bottom:10px;font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;letter-spacing:2px;">CLICK EACH STAGE TO EXPLORE ↓</p>
    <div class="flow anim" id="solution-flow">
      <div class="chip" data-info="IoT mesh of DHT22/BMP280 + acoustic sensors at every rack. ESP32 mesh protocol. Real-time thermal mapping across entire facility.">① SENSE</div><div class="arr">→</div>
      <div class="chip" data-info="LSTM neural network forecasts hotspot formation 30–60 minutes ahead. Trained on 18 months of Bengaluru climate + server load data.">② PREDICT</div><div class="arr">→</div>
      <div class="chip" data-info="Deep Q-Network RL agent controls CRAC setpoints, airflow, and economiser valves autonomously. Validated in EnergyPlus digital twin before live deployment.">③ OPTIMISE</div><div class="arr">→</div>
      <div class="chip" data-info="Grafana real-time dashboard + hardware failure prediction. Full audit trail for ESG reporting. Capital planning built in.">④ REPORT</div>
    </div>
    <div id="flow-detail" style="min-height:52px;background:rgba(0,229,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.2);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 20px;width:100%;max-width:800px;text-align:center;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--dim);margin-top:8px;display:none;"></div>
    <ul class="pts anim">
      <li><strong>Zero hardware replacement</strong> — overlays on existing BACnet / Modbus infrastructure</li>
      <li>Target: PUE <strong class="hi">1.5–1.6 → 1.2</strong>, energy cost reduction <strong class="hi">20–30%</strong></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 5 · TECH STACK ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s5" data-n="5" data-steps="0">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:960px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Technology Stack</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">Not Science Fiction. <em>Science.</em><br>(Okay, Also a Little Magic.)</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="two-col anim">
      <div class="col-box">
        <h3>⚡ HARDWARE — IoT LAYER</h3>
        <ul class="pts instant">
          <li>DHT22 sensors: <strong>±0.5°C, ±2% RH</strong> at every third rack</li>
          <li>ESP32 mesh (ESP-MESH) — self-healing, interference-proof</li>
          <li>MEMS acoustic sensors on CRAC fans — <strong>3–5 min early warning</strong></li>
          <li>MQTT → Apache Kafka → InfluxDB time-series pipeline</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="col-box">
        <h3>🧠 SOFTWARE — AI LAYER</h3>
        <ul class="pts instant">
          <li>LSTM: Thermal forecasting <strong>30–60 min ahead</strong></li>
          <li>DQN RL agent: Trained in <strong>EnergyPlus</strong> — zero live risk on Day 1</li>
          <li>CFD Digital Twin: Every decision validated before execution</li>
          <li>BACnet / Modbus: <strong>No hardware replacement needed</strong></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 6 · THE PROOF ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s6" data-n="6" data-steps="3">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:860px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Proof of Concept</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">"What If I Told You...<br>AI Already <em>Solved This</em> for Google?"</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="quote anim">
      <p>"What if I told you the cooling problem was already solved — just not for your market?"</p>
      <cite>— DeepMind × Google, 2016. Morpheus would approve.</cite>
    </div>
    <div class="big-stat anim" id="deepmind-stat">0%</div>
    <p class="big-sub anim">Cooling energy reduction achieved by DeepMind RL at Google data centres</p>
    <ul class="pts anim">
      <li>DeepMind applied Deep RL to Google's DCs in 2016. <strong>Result: 40% less cooling energy</strong> — with zero hardware changes</li>
      <li>That technology is <strong>proprietary</strong> — available to nobody outside Google</li>
      <li>Absolut Zero targets a <strong class="hi">conservative 20%</strong> — still ₹48L/year per client</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 7 · BUSINESS MODEL ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s7" data-n="7" data-steps="3">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:900px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Business Model</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">Cooling-as-a-Service.<br><em>If We Save Nothing, You Pay Nothing.</em></h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="quote anim">
      <p>"The first rule of our business model: you don't pay unless we actually deliver."</p>
      <cite>— Fight Club (1999), slightly repurposed</cite>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-row anim">
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">₹0</span><span class="lbl">Upfront cost to client</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">30</span><span class="lbl">Days shadow mode baseline — no control yet</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">25%</span><span class="lbl">Our share of verified savings only</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">Zero</span><span class="lbl">Client risk. Performance = payment.</span></div>
    </div>
    <ul class="pts anim">
      <li>We deploy all hardware and software — <strong>no capex burden on the client</strong></li>
      <li>Savings verified against measured baseline via <strong>existing PDU metering</strong></li>
      <li>If the system underperforms, <strong>we carry the loss</strong> — not the client</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 8 · UNIT ECONOMICS ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s8" data-n="8" data-steps="0">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:880px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Unit Economics</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">"<em>Show Me The Money.</em>" — Here It Is.</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="stat-row anim">
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">₹2.4 Cr</span><span class="lbl">Annual cooling cost (1 MW)</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">₹48L</span><span class="lbl">Annual savings (20% opt.)</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">₹12L</span><span class="lbl">Our revenue/client/year</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num">15 mo</span><span class="lbl">Payback on deployment cost</span></div>
    </div>
    <!-- INTERACTIVE CALCULATOR -->
    <div id="pue-calc" class="anim">
      <h3>🔢 SAVINGS CALCULATOR — DRAG TO YOUR FACILITY SIZE</h3>
      <div class="calc-row">
        <label>FACILITY SIZE</label>
        <input type="range" id="mw-slider" min="0.5" max="10" step="0.5" value="1">
        <span class="calc-val" id="mw-val">1 MW</span>
      </div>
      <div class="calc-result">
        <div class="calc-box"><span class="r-val" id="c-cost">₹2.4 Cr</span><span class="r-lbl">Annual cooling cost</span></div>
        <div class="calc-box"><span class="r-val" id="c-save">₹48 L</span><span class="r-lbl">Your annual savings</span></div>
        <div class="calc-box"><span class="r-val" id="c-rev">₹12 L</span><span class="r-lbl">Our revenue (25%)</span></div>
        <div class="calc-box"><span class="r-val" id="c-payback">15 mo</span><span class="r-lbl">Payback period</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-row anim" style="margin-top:10px;">
      <div class="scard"><span class="num" style="font-size:1rem;">Y1</span><span class="lbl">3 clients · ₹36L</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num" style="font-size:1rem;">Y2</span><span class="lbl">10 clients · ₹1.2 Cr</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num" style="font-size:1rem;">Y3</span><span class="lbl">25 clients · ₹3 Cr</span></div>
      <div class="scard"><span class="num" style="font-size:1rem;">Y5</span><span class="lbl">70+ clients · ₹9+ Cr</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 9 · ROADMAP ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s9" data-n="9" data-steps="0">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:1020px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Implementation Roadmap</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">"It Ain't About How Hard You Hit.<br>It's About <em>How Much Heat</em> You Can Take."</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="quote anim">
      <p>"It ain't about how hard you hit — it's about how much you can take and keep moving forward."</p>
      <cite>— Rocky Balboa (2006). Also: our deployment philosophy.</cite>
    </div>
    <p class="anim" style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--grey);margin-bottom:8px;font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;letter-spacing:2px;">CLICK A PHASE FOR DETAILS</p>
    <div class="timeline anim">
      <div class="phase" data-detail="Hardware sensors installed. AI observes all data but controls nothing. Baseline established. Client sees live dashboard for the first time.">
        <span class="ph-n">PHASE 0</span><span class="ph-t">SHADOW</span><span class="ph-s">Month 0–1</span>
      </div>
      <div class="phase" data-detail="LSTM model goes live. Grafana dashboard deployed. 45-day supervised learning period. Hotspot predictions shown to engineers — they approve manually.">
        <span class="ph-n">PHASE 1</span><span class="ph-t">PREDICT</span><span class="ph-s">Month 1–3</span>
      </div>
      <div class="phase" data-detail="Acoustic sensors active on CRAC fans. Hardware failure predictions begin. Maintenance teams get 3–5 minute early warnings on fan degradation.">
        <span class="ph-n">PHASE 2</span><span class="ph-t">ALERT</span><span class="ph-s">Month 3–5</span>
      </div>
      <div class="phase" data-detail="RL agent recommends CRAC setpoint changes. Engineer approves each action with one click. Trust is built incrementally. No autonomous control yet.">
        <span class="ph-n">PHASE 3</span><span class="ph-t">PARTIAL</span><span class="ph-s">Month 5–7</span>
      </div>
      <div class="phase" style="border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.4);" data-detail="Full autonomous control activated. Gain-share contract goes live. Client receives monthly savings reports. We bill 25% of verified savings only.">
        <span class="ph-n">PHASE 4</span><span class="ph-t" style="color:#00e5ff;">AUTONOMOUS</span><span class="ph-s">Month 7–9</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="phase-detail"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 10 · COMPETITION ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s10" data-n="10" data-steps="0">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:920px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Competitive Landscape</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">"Nobody Puts <em>Absolut Zero</em> in a Corner."</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="quote anim">
      <p>"Nobody puts Baby in a corner." — Dirty Dancing (1987). Nobody puts us in a comparison table without winning.</p>
    </div>
    <table class="ctable anim">
      <tr><th>Competitor</th><th>What They Do</th><th>Their Gap</th><th>We Win Because</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Schneider EcoStruxure</td><td>BMS + basic automation</td><td class="x">No RL, no India tuning, $500K+ entry</td><td class="check">AI-native + India-specific</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Vertiv Thermal Mgmt</td><td>Hardware cooling systems</td><td class="x">No AI, hardware replacement required</td><td class="check">Zero replacement. Pure software.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>DeepMind Cooling AI</td><td>RL for Google DCs</td><td class="x">Proprietary. Not commercial. Hyperscale only.</td><td class="check">We serve the market they ignore.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Vigilent (ABB)</td><td>AI cooling, large scale</td><td class="x">No India presence, no mid-tier pricing</td><td class="check">Built for India's mid-tier. Always.</td></tr>
      <tr class="us"><td>⚡ Absolut Zero</td><td>Full-stack AI + IoT, CaaS</td><td class="check">India-native · Mid-tier · Zero upfront</td><td class="check">Only solution that ticks every box.</td></tr>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 11 · ETHICS ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s11" data-n="11" data-steps="0">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:840px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Ethics &amp; Compliance</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">"With Great Power Comes<br><em>Great Responsibility.</em>"</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="quote anim">
      <p>"With great power comes great responsibility." — Spider-Man (2002). Autonomous AI in critical infra means we take this seriously.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pillars anim">
      <div class="pillar">
        <span class="pnum">01</span><span class="ptitle">EXPLAINABLE AI (XAI)</span>
        <span class="pdesc">Every RL decision logged via Google Model Cards — any engineer can audit any action, any time</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pillar">
        <span class="pnum">02</span><span class="ptitle">DPDPA 2023 COMPLIANT</span>
        <span class="pdesc">We monitor infrastructure metadata only — temperatures, fan speeds, power draw. No personal data. Ever.</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pillar">
        <span class="pnum">03</span><span class="ptitle">NSAI 2018 ALIGNED</span>
        <span class="pdesc">India's National AI Strategy identifies infrastructure as a priority vertical — Absolut Zero is that strategy in action</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pillar">
        <span class="pnum">04</span><span class="ptitle">ESG READY</span>
        <span class="pdesc">Scope 2 carbon reporting built-in. Grafana + InfluxDB produce audit-ready energy records automatically</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 12 · SCALABILITY ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s12" data-n="12" data-steps="0">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:1020px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Scalability &amp; Expansion</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">"Roads? Where We're Going,<br>We Don't Need <em>Roads.</em>"</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="quote anim">
      <p>"Roads? Where we're going, we don't need roads." — Doc Brown, Back to the Future (1985). Bengaluru is just the start.</p>
    </div>
    <p class="anim" style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--grey);margin-bottom:8px;font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;letter-spacing:2px;">HOVER EACH CITY FOR CONTEXT</p>
    <div class="cities anim">
      <div class="city" style="border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.45);">
        <span class="cy-yr">YEAR 1–2</span><span class="cy-nm">Bengaluru</span><span class="cy-mw">205 MW</span><span class="cy-note">BESCOM model built. Ready now.</span>
      </div>
      <div class="city">
        <span class="cy-yr">YEAR 2–3</span><span class="cy-nm">Chennai</span><span class="cy-mw">~150 MW</span><span class="cy-note">Coastal humidity + TANGEDCO rates</span>
      </div>
      <div class="city">
        <span class="cy-yr">YEAR 2–3</span><span class="cy-nm">Mumbai</span><span class="cy-mw">~300 MW</span><span class="cy-note">Dense cluster + MSEDCL tariffs</span>
      </div>
      <div class="city">
        <span class="cy-yr">YEAR 3</span><span class="cy-nm">Hyderabad</span><span class="cy-mw">~130 MW</span><span class="cy-note">Hyperscale cluster, TSSPDCL</span>
      </div>
      <div class="city">
        <span class="cy-yr">YEAR 4–5</span><span class="cy-nm">SE Asia</span><span class="cy-mw">SG: 1,100 MW</span><span class="cy-note">Tropical climate = easy adapt</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <ul class="pts anim instant" style="max-width:820px;margin-top:14px;">
      <li>Same core AI engine everywhere — only <strong>climate model + grid tariff layer</strong> is localised per city</li>
      <li>Year 5: <strong class="hi">₹9+ crore</strong> recurring revenue · <strong class="hi">70+ clients</strong> · Pan-India + SE Asia footprint</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 13 · BRAND ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s13" data-n="13" data-steps="0">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:920px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">Brand &amp; Go-To-Market</div>
    <h2 class="slide-title anim">"The Name's Zero. <em>Absolut Zero.</em>"</h2>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="brand-row anim">
      <div class="brand-card"><span class="bc-icon">🎯</span><span class="bc-title">TARGET BUYER</span><span class="bc-desc">VP Infrastructure / Head of DC Ops. Pain point: "My cooling bill is my biggest variable cost."</span></div>
      <div class="brand-card"><span class="bc-icon">🔥</span><span class="bc-title">BRAND TONE</span><span class="bc-desc">Neon-noir precision. Technical confidence. Cool under pressure. Literally.</span></div>
      <div class="brand-card"><span class="bc-icon">🚀</span><span class="bc-title">GTM STRATEGY</span><span class="bc-desc">Direct sales to Bengaluru colo operators + ITIR campuses. Pilot = case study = next client.</span></div>
      <div class="brand-card"><span class="bc-icon">📣</span><span class="bc-title">CHANNELS</span><span class="bc-desc">DC infrastructure events, BEE energy compliance forums, Karnataka DC Policy ecosystem.</span></div>
    </div>
    <ul class="pts anim instant" style="max-width:820px;margin-top:16px;">
      <li><strong>Positioning:</strong> The only AI cooling platform built for India's climate, grid, and mid-tier market</li>
      <li><strong>Differentiator:</strong> Zero upfront + gain-share removes every adoption barrier simultaneously</li>
      <li><strong>Tagline:</strong> <em class="hi">"Autonomous Thermal Intelligence — Starting with Bengaluru, Scaling Across India."</em></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ─── SLIDE 14 · CLOSE ─── -->
<div class="slide" id="s14" data-n="14" data-steps="0">
  <div style="width:100%;max-width:900px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="tag anim">The Pitch</div>
    <p class="close-quote anim">"The greatest trick the devil ever pulled was convincing the world that <em>cooling was a fixed cost.</em>"</p>
    <div class="neon-bar anim"></div>
    <div class="pilot-box anim">
      <h3>THE NEXT STEP: PILOT</h3>
      <p>50–100 racks &nbsp;·&nbsp; 90-day verification &nbsp;·&nbsp; Zero client risk<br><br>
      Data centres in Bengaluru are spending <strong>₹2.4 crore/year</strong> per MW on cooling that AI can optimise. Every month without Absolut Zero is money that doesn't need to be spent.<br><br>
      <strong style="color:#00e5ff;">Karnataka's next gigawatt of AI compute is coming. The question is whether it arrives as a liability — or a competitive asset.</strong></p>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:24px;" class="anim">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64,
" alt="Absolut Zero" style="height:70px;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(0,229,255,0.6));">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- /deck -->

<script>
const TOTAL = 14;
let cur = 1;
let stepIndex = 0; // current bullet step within slide
let stepItems = []; // bullet <li> elements for current slide

// ── DOM refs ──
const allSlides = () => document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
const counter   = document.getElementById('slide-counter');
const progBar   = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
const cornerLogo = document.getElementById('corner-logo');
const hintEl    = document.getElementById('hint');

// ── DOT NAV ──
const dotNav = document.getElementById('dot-nav');
for (let i = 1; i <= TOTAL; i++) {
  const d = document.createElement('div');
  d.className = 'dot' + (i === 1 ? ' active' : '');
  d.title = 'Slide ' + i;
  d.addEventListener('click', () => goTo(i));
  dotNav.appendChild(d);
}

function updateDots(n) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.dot').forEach((d, i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i + 1 === n));
}

// ── NAVIGATION ──
function initSlideSteps(n) {
  const slide = document.getElementById('s' + n);
  const steps = parseInt(slide.dataset.steps || '0');
  stepIndex = 0;
  stepItems = steps > 0 ? Array.from(slide.querySelectorAll('.pts:not(.instant) li')) : [];
  // Reset visibility
  stepItems.forEach(li => li.classList.remove('revealed'));
  updateHint(n);
}

function updateHint(n) {
  const remaining = stepItems.length - stepIndex;
  if (remaining > 0) {
    hintEl.textContent = `SPACE / → · ${remaining} POINT${remaining > 1 ? 'S' : ''} REMAINING`;
  } else if (n < TOTAL) {
    hintEl.textContent = 'SPACE / → NEXT SLIDE';
  } else {
    hintEl.textContent = '← TO GO BACK';
  }
}

function advanceStep() {
  if (stepIndex < stepItems.length) {
    stepItems[stepIndex].classList.add('revealed');
    stepIndex++;
    updateHint(cur);
    return true;
  }
  return false;
}

function goTo(n, force) {
  if (n < 1 || n > TOTAL) return;
  // If current slide has unrevealed steps and we're going forward, reveal first
  if (!force && n > cur && stepIndex < stepItems.length) {
    advanceStep(); return;
  }
  const prev = cur;
  cur = n;
  allSlides().forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('s' + cur).classList.add('active');
  counter.textContent = String(cur).padStart(2,'0') + ' / ' + String(TOTAL).padStart(2,'0');
  progBar.style.width = (cur / TOTAL * 100) + '%';
  cornerLogo.style.display = cur === 1 ? 'none' : 'block';
  updateDots(cur);
  initSlideSteps(cur);
  onSlideEnter(cur);
}

function advance() {
  if (stepIndex < stepItems.length) { advanceStep(); }
  else { goTo(cur + 1); }
}

function onSlideEnter(n) {
  if (n === 3) animateCounters();
  if (n === 6) animateDeepMind();
  if (n === 8) { initCalc(); resetCalc(); }
  if (n === 9) initTimeline();
  if (n === 4) initFlow();
}

// ── EVENTS ──
document.getElementById('btn-next').addEventListener('click', advance);
document.getElementById('btn-prev').addEventListener('click', () => goTo(cur - 1));
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (['ArrowRight','ArrowDown',' '].includes(e.key)) { e.preventDefault(); advance(); }
  if (['ArrowLeft','ArrowUp'].includes(e.key)) { e.preventDefault(); goTo(cur - 1); }
});
let tx = 0;
document.addEventListener('touchstart', e => { tx = e.touches[0].clientX; });
document.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
  const dx = tx - e.changedTouches[0].clientX;
  if (Math.abs(dx) > 50) { if (dx > 0) advance(); else goTo(cur - 1); }
});

// ── ANIMATED COUNTERS (Slide 3) ──
function animateCounters() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.num[data-target]').forEach(el => {
    const target = parseInt(el.dataset.target);
    let val = 0; const step = Math.ceil(target / 40);
    const iv = setInterval(() => {
      val = Math.min(val + step, target);
      el.textContent = val + ' MW';
      if (val >= target) clearInterval(iv);
    }, 30);
  });
}

// ── DEEPMIND STAT COUNTER (Slide 6) ──
function animateDeepMind() {
  const el = document.getElementById('deepmind-stat');
  if (!el) return;
  let v = 0;
  const iv = setInterval(() => {
    v = Math.min(v + 2, 40);
    el.textContent = v + '%';
    if (v >= 40) clearInterval(iv);
  }, 40);
}

// ── SOLUTION FLOW (Slide 4) ──
function initFlow() {
  const detail = document.getElementById('flow-detail');
  document.querySelectorAll('#solution-flow .chip').forEach(chip => {
    chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('#solution-flow .chip').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
      chip.classList.add('active');
      detail.textContent = chip.dataset.info;
      detail.style.display = 'block';
    });
  });
}

// ── PHASE TIMELINE (Slide 9) ──
function initTimeline() {
  const detail = document.getElementById('phase-detail');
  document.querySelectorAll('.phase').forEach(ph => {
    ph.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.phase').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('selected'));
      ph.classList.add('selected');
      detail.textContent = ph.dataset.detail;
      detail.style.display = 'block';
    });
  });
}

// ── SAVINGS CALCULATOR (Slide 8) ──
function initCalc() {
  const slider = document.getElementById('mw-slider');
  if (!slider) return;
  slider.addEventListener('input', resetCalc);
}
function resetCalc() {
  const slider = document.getElementById('mw-slider');
  if (!slider) return;
  const mw = parseFloat(slider.value);
  document.getElementById('mw-val').textContent = mw + ' MW';
  const annualCooling = mw * 2.4; // crore
  const savings = mw * 0.48; // crore (20%)
  const rev = savings * 0.25; // crore (25% of savings)
  const deploymentCost = mw * 0.15; // crore (₹15L per MW)
  const paybackMonths = Math.round((deploymentCost / rev) * 12);

  const fmt = v => v >= 1 ? '₹' + v.toFixed(1) + ' Cr' : '₹' + Math.round(v * 100) + ' L';
  document.getElementById('c-cost').textContent = fmt(annualCooling);
  document.getElementById('c-save').textContent = fmt(savings);
  document.getElementById('c-rev').textContent  = fmt(rev);
  document.getElementById('c-payback').textContent = paybackMonths + ' mo';
}

// ── INIT ──
goTo(1, true);
</script>
</body>
</html>
